title: Canadian accounting firms still hire around process pain before they automate it
summary: A public research note on how canadian accounting firms often add back-office headcount before showing visible automation tools.
contextLine: Updated from EnrichAnything market scans · live snapshot from March 23, 2026
dataNote: Built from the latest published EnrichAnything market scan.
citationText: Based on EnrichAnything's latest scan of matching firms, 100% already include an explicit gap signal and 68% include a timing note.
